summary: Draft PR for Data Delete menu decompilation work in src/melee/mn/mndatadel. It replaced multiple placeholder symbols with C bodies, updated mndatadel headers and static structs, and produced bot-reported code-match gains, but the PR body and human review feedback are absent and the PR was closed unmerged.

key_files.role: Main Data Delete menu decompilation body; added implementations and revised existing warning-modal logic.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndatadel.c +666/-27

diff.diff: added bodies for mnDataDel_8024E940, mnDataDel_8024EA6C, mnDataDel_8024EBC8, fn_8024F1D4, fn_8024F318, fn_8024F840, fn_8024FBA4, fn_8024FC48, mnDataDel_8024FE4C, mnDataDel_80250170 excerpted/truncated
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report for main/melee/mn/mndatadel

key_files.role: Public prototypes updated from UNK_PARAMS or nameless HSD_GObj arguments to typed signatures.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndatadel.h +11/-8
diff.diff: mnDataDel_8024EBC8 now takes HSD_JObj* root, u8 arg1, u8 arg2, u8 arg3; fn_* prototypes named arg0/gobj

key_files.role: Static data/types expanded for Data Delete menu state, selection data, item deletion flags, arrays, externs, and animation helper.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mndatadel.static.h +60/-16
diff.diff: added MnDataDelSelectData, MnDataDelUserData, expanded WarnCmnData comments, changed x3C/x58 scalars into arrays, added SetItemChildAnim inline and extern floats

key_files.role: MenuInputState comments added for cooldown-related fields.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mnmain.h +3/-3
diff.diff: MenuInputState cooldown/x2/x4 gained explanatory comments

what_changed: Added numerous includes in mndatadel.c for baselib, gm, lb, and ty dependencies used by the new function bodies.

Added source bodies for previously placeholder Data Delete menu functions, including deletion actions, confirmation handling, cursor movement, SIS text handling, animation playback, archive section loading, and menu transition behavior.
Reworked fn_8024ECCC to use a named gobj parameter, direct gobj->hsd_obj access, menu_data = &mnDataDel_803EF870, x30 animation settings, and an end_frame pointer.
Updated mndatadel.h so mnDataDel_8024EBC8 has a concrete HSD_JObj/u8 signature and added baselib/jobj.h for that type.

Expanded mndatadel.static.h with recovered local structs, arrays for menu joint indices and SIS label IDs, a SetItemChildAnim inline helper, static model descriptors, and extern float/data declarations.
Bot report recorded 3 new matches: mnDataDel_80250170, fn_8024F1D4, and .bss for main/melee/mn/mndatadel.

Bot report recorded 11 improvements in unmatched functions/data, including fn_8024F318, mnDataDel_8024FE4C, fn_8024F840, mnDataDel_8024EA6C, mnDataDel_8024E940, mnDataDel_8024EBC8, fn_8024FD40, fn_8024FC48, fn_8024FBA4, .data, and fn_8024ECCC.
Bot report recorded one unmatched-function regression: .sdata2 moved from 42.11% to 36.36%.
smart_moves: Recovered struct and array shapes in mndatadel.static.h so repeated x3C and x58 fields could be accessed as indexed menu data rather than as separate scalar fields.
Updated the header prototype for mnDataDel_8024EBC8 after recovering its body signature, aligning with truthful-header practice.
Used natural loops in several repeated menu-item operations, including iterating over six menu items and over a 29-entry gm check.
Kept bot-reported match/regression output attached to the PR evidence instead of treating the draft PR as accepted or merged.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When repeated menu-item data fields form contiguous tables, recovering array fields in the static struct can make menu traversal and label selection code clearer and closer to authored source.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: MnDataDelData x3C[7] and x58[6] replace individual x3C/x40/... and x58/x5A/... fields
diff.diff: loops index menu_data->x3C[i] and menu_data->x58[data->selected_item]

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovering an unknown function body should be accompanied by updating its exposed prototype when the argument types become clear.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mndatadel.h changes mnDataDel_8024EBC8(UNK_PARAMS) to HSD_JObj* root and three u8 arguments

decomp_lessons.lesson: Padding locals and unused-argument casts may be used as narrow matching tactics, but they require explicit match evidence and should not be generalized as style.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: u8 _pad arrays in several functions
diff.diff: (void) arg3 comment says unused but affects caller register allocation
decomp_standards: matching-tactics-need-evidence

naming_conventions.convention: Use short role names for clear local object handles, such as gobj, root, child, panel, exclaim, cursor_yes, cursor_no, text, proc, menu_data, and user_data.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: fn_8024ECCC parameter renamed arg0 to gobj and local root = gobj->hsd_obj
diff.diff: added locals child, menu_data, user_data, proc, text in new bodies

naming_conventions.convention: Keep address-style function names when semantic function meaning is not proven, while adding semantic local/field names where behavior is directly evident.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: functions remain mnDataDel_8024E940/fn_8024F318/etc.
diff.diff: MnDataDelUserData fields selected_item, confirm_active, item_deleted, label_text, menu_joints

naming_conventions.convention: Use field comments to document recovered but still partly unknown state fields without over-renaming them.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: WarnCmnData x0, visible, cursor_idx comments
diff.diff: MenuInputState cooldown, x2, x4 comments

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit stack padding locals to influence stack/register layout in matching functions.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: u8 _pad[8], _pad2[16], _pad[0x10], _pad[0x58], _pad[0x34] appear in added function bodies
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Standards require narrow verifier evidence for PAD_STACK-style tactics; this PR has bot match percentages but no per-tactic explanation.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Preserve an unused argument with a cast when it affects caller register allocation.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnDataDel_8024EBC8 contains (void) arg3 with comment 'unused but affects caller register allocation'
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Useful as a matching clue, but should remain scoped and justified by objdiff/build evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use do-while and for loops for repeated indexed menu and game-state operations.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnDataDel_8024E940 do-while over i < 29
diff.diff: mnDataDel_8024EA6C do-while over i < 6
diff.diff: fn_8024FBA4 for i < 6
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Supported by natural-loop standard and the diff shape.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use direct gobj->hsd_obj instead of GET_JOBJ in fn_8024ECCC.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: root = GET_JOBJ(arg0) changed to root = gobj->hsd_obj
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Header-inlines standard says GET_JOBJ should not be used unconditionally; this PR gives evidence of direct access but not a general rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce local structs/arrays for menu user data and static data to replace less-typed offset access in many places.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: added MnDataDelUserData and MnDataDelData arrays
diff.diff: accesses data->item_deleted, data->selected_item, menu_data->x3C, menu_data->x58
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: One excerpt still uses ((u8*) data)[offset], so type recovery appears incomplete.

review_feedback.feedback: Bot report for GALE01 showed matched code +0.02% (+672 bytes), matched data +0.00% (+48 bytes), 3 new matches, 11 improvements in unmatched functions, and 1 .sdata2 regression.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot] at 2026-01-10T02:39:47Z

review_feedback.feedback: No loaded human review comments or PR body rationale are available.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: review_comments 0, reviews 0, issue_comments 1
text_corpus.jsonl: pr_body is empty

follow_up_queries: mndatadel MnDataDelUserData item_deleted selected_item label_text menu_joints
mnDataDel_8024EBC8 arg3 unused affects caller register allocation
gm_1601 functions correct signatures gm_801647D0 gm_801641CC gm_80164430 gm_80164250
mndatadel local declarations gm_1601 owning header

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR 2078 identity, closed state, draft true in raw_pr_json, merged_at null
changed_files.jsonl: four changed files and line counts
diff.diff: concrete code/header excerpts, but loaded raw_diff was truncated in the initial packet
text_corpus.jsonl: empty PR body and bot report
metadata_json: no review comments and no reviews
notes: The diff is large and initially truncated, though targeted header-diff lookup recovered the changed header/static-header details.
No human review comments are loaded, so reviewer intent and acceptance cannot be inferred.
The PR was closed with merged_at null; do not treat its source shapes as accepted project style.
Bot report provides match/improvement/regression metrics, but it does not explain individual padding, local declaration, or data-section tradeoffs.
Several functions are bot-reported as improvements rather than full matches, so source shapes in those functions should be treated as candidate evidence only.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover array-shaped static menu tables before writing repeated menu logic
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2078 shows Data Delete menu code becoming more reviewable after MnDataDelData scalar runs were represented as x3C[7] joint indices and x58[6] SIS label IDs, enabling indexed loops and selection logic.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: MnDataDelData x3C[7] and x58[6]
diff.diff: looped accesses menu_data->x3C[i] and menu_data->x58[data->selected_item]

accepted_candidate_records.title: Function-body recovery should update real prototypes when signatures become known
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2078 changed mnDataDel_8024EBC8 from UNK_PARAMS to a concrete HSD_JObj* plus u8 arguments in mndatadel.h after adding the function body.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mndatadel.h prototype update for mnDataDel_8024EBC8

source_update_candidates.title: Local recovered prototypes should move to owning headers rather than remaining source-local
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2078 adds source-local declarations for gm_1601 functions with a comment saying they have correct signatures. This may be a useful negative example for the truthful-headers standard: when signatures are recovered, curator should consider whether the owning gm header should receive them instead of keeping local declarations.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: /* Local declarations for gm_1601 functions with correct signatures */ followed by gm_801647D0, gm_801641CC, gm_80164430, gm_80164250, gm_801641E4, gm_801603B0, gm_8016505C
decomp_standards: truthful-headers-and-includes
source_update_candidates.reason: The evidence supports a possible standards note or example, but because this PR was draft/closed and unreviewed, it should not be promoted without curator review.

source_update_candidates.title: Padding locals and unused-argument casts need per-symbol evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2078 uses explicit padding locals and an unused argument cast annotated as affecting caller register allocation. This is a candidate example for the existing matching-tactics standard: such tactics can appear in matching work, but should be documented with narrow objdiff/checkdiff evidence.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: multiple u8 _pad locals
diff.diff: (void) arg3 comment in mnDataDel_8024EBC8
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report gives overall match/improvement metrics
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence shows tactic usage but does not prove each tactic was necessary; route as a candidate example only.

source_update_candidates.title: mndatadel owns Data Delete menu state and animation helpers
source_update_candidates.text: The PR evidence indicates src/melee/mn/mndatadel.c and mndatadel.static.h cover Data Delete menu item selection, deletion flags, confirmation dialog state, SIS label text, JObj animation, and archive-loaded static models.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: MnDataDelUserData fields selected_item, confirm_active, item_deleted, label_text, menu_joints
diff.diff: WarnCmnData fields and confirmation handlers
diff.diff: lbArchive_LoadSections in mnDataDel_80250170 excerpt
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful as a path fact candidate, but the PR was closed unmerged and should be checked against current source before acceptance.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that this PR's local gm_1601 declarations are accepted style; the PR was draft/closed and has no human review.
Do not claim all added functions matched. The bot report lists only mnDataDel_80250170 and fn_8024F1D4 as new function matches; most other functions are improvements with less than 100%.
Do not treat the .sdata2 regression as accepted or resolved; the only evidence says it regressed.
Do not promote the direct gobj->hsd_obj replacement over GET_JOBJ as a global rule; the evidence is local to fn_8024ECCC.
